message:
refactor(storage): complete rusqlite-to-frankensqlite migration across remaining call sites

Finish the migration started in 97991d6f by updating all remaining
consumers and the export engine:

Type rename (5 files):
- Rename SqliteStorage -> FrankenStorage in all consumers:
  cass-pages-perf-bundle.rs, daemon/core.rs, daemon/worker.rs,
  lib.rs, pages/wizard.rs

Export engine (pages/export.rs):
- Rewrite imports from rusqlite::Connection to frankensqlite
- Remove trailing [] empty-param from DDL execute calls (6 sites)
- Change DML execute to execute_compat with frankensqlite::params!
- last_insert_rowid() now returns Result (needs ?)

WAL auto-repair (lib.rs):
- state_meta_json() WAL corruption repair uses frankensqlite::Connection
  instead of rusqlite::Connection

Batch param types (storage/sqlite.rs):
- batch_insert_fts_messages: params_vec type -> ParamValue
- update_daily_stats_batched_in_tx: correct param type alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
